1775.reason: [Should not add "&&" token for single '&'; should add "&" as invalid and report error 'a']

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Should not add "&&" token for single '&'; should add "&" as invalid and report error 'a']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Incorrectly adds AND token for single '&' at end of line; should only report error 'a' without adding any token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.25 , reason:  [Should not add AND token for single '&'; should only report error 'a' and skip the single '&']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.25 , reason:  [When encountering a single '&', it should not create an AND token but should only report error 'a'. Creating "&&" token for single '&' is incorrect.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [When encountering a single '&', it should not generate an AND token. Instead, it should report error 'a' without adding any token for the single '&'.]

1786.reason: [Should not add "&&" token when only single '&' is present; should treat as single '&' and report error 'a']

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Should not add "&&" token when only single '&' is present; should treat as single '&' and report error 'a']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Incorrectly adds AND token for single '&'; should only report error 'a' without adding any token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.25 , reason:  [Should not add AND token for single '&'; should only report error 'a' and treat the single '&' as invalid]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.25 , reason:  [When encountering a single '&', it should not create an AND token but should only report error 'a'. The token value should be "&", not "&&".]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [When encountering a single '&', it incorrectly adds an AND token before reporting the error. It should only report error 'a' without adding any token.]
